title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China unveiled JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid with a split AI brain architecture for real-time perception and control. Vietnam introduced two humanoid robots (Dyno and VR-H3) for security, homes, and industrial applications. NVIDIA released the Isaac GR00T robot reference platform with Jetson Thor compute and Unitree H2 as a full-stack research system.
